title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Rivigo

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Rivigo
jsonLd.description:
Rivigo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
